zh.lifeSummary: 當John Abbott於1495年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親William Robert Abbott25歲，母親Mary Alice Turman25歲。他於1518年與Joane Carrowe在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1541年住在英國英格蘭。他去世於1545年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Abbott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English abbod, abbot(t), abbat ‘abbot’ (Old English abbod) or Old French abet ‘priest’. Both the Old English and the Old French term are derived from Late Latin abbas (genitive abbatis) ‘priest’, from Greek abbas, from Aramaic aba ‘father’. The nickname was presumably a joking reference to a person's behaviour. In the US, the English name is also sometimes a translation of a cognate or equivalent European name, e.g. Italian Abate , Spanish Abad , or German Abt .

History: George Abbot from Yorkshire, England, settled in Andover, MA, in 1640; he had numerous prominent descendants. George Abbott (probably not the same man) died in Rowley, MA, in 1647. Another early migrant was James Abbott, who came from Somerset, England, to Long Island, NY, in the 17th century.

variants.name: Abate
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Carmelo, Carmine, Gaetano, Vito, Angelo, Canio, Rocco, Sal, Aldo, Carlo.

Italian: from abate ‘priest’ (from Late Latin abbas ‘priest’, genitive abbatis). It could be a nickname, perhaps given to someone who behaved in a priest-like manner, an occupational name for the servant of a priest, or it may denote an (illegitimate) son of a priest. Compare Labate .

variants.name: Abbot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Abbott . The spelling with one -t is more typically Scottish than English, and in Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland, this is sometimes an Anglicized form of McNabb .

variants.name: Abbotts
meanings: topographic or occupational name from Middle English (atte) abbotes ‘(at the, of the) abbot's (house or quarters)’, a name for someone who lived or worked at such a place, presumably a servant.
variant of Abbott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Abbott was born in 1495, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Robert Abbott, was 25 and his mother, Mary Alice Turman, was 25. He married Joane Carrowe in 1518, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in England, United Kingdom in 1541. He died in 1545, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Abbott est né en 1495, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Robert Abbott, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Alice Turman, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joane Carrowe en 1518, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1541. Il est décédé en 1545, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Abbottが1495年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父William Robert Abbottは25歳，母Mary Alice Turmanは25歳であった。1518年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでJoane Carroweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年にはイギリスイギリスに住んでいた。彼は1545年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Abbott(이)가 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Robert Abbott(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Alice Turman(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1518년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Joane Carrowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1541년도에 영국 잉글랜드에서 살았다. 그는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Abbott nasceu em 1495, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Robert Abbott, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Alice Turman, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Carrowe em 1518, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1541. Ele faleceu em 1545, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Abbott родился в 1495 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Robert Abbott было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Alice Turman, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Carrowe в 1518 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности Англия, Великобритания в 1541 году. Он умер в 1545 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Abbott nació en 1495, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Robert Abbott, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Alice Turman, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joane Carrowe en 1518, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1541. Murió en 1545, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
